title: Supreme Court stays arbitration in AP traffic challan fraud involving Digi Yatra developer
description: The Supreme Court on April 2 stayed the arbitral proceedings between State of Andhra Pradesh and Dataevolve Solutions, the developer of Digi Yatra, over a scam involving siphoning of ₹37 crore from traffic challans [State of Andhra Pradesh Vs Dataevolve].A Bench of Chief Justice of India Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi issued notice to Dataevolve on the State’s appeal against Andhra Pradesh High Court's decision to appoint an arbitrator to adjudicate the dispute.The
